title: dalbergia sissoides
intro: Dalbergia sissoides, also known as Pali or Bahera, is a deciduous tree native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Dalbergia sissoides include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of the tree are commonly used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
